title: Ability to Change Default Send Email

posts.author: KayChaple (Kailee Chapman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

My team and I all have individual emails, but we send customer emails from a shared email for consistency and visibility. However, Monday CRM defaults to sending from our personal emails, which makes it so that other team members cannot see the emails we have sent (they are marked as private and hidden).

What are you trying to achieve

It would be super cool if there was a way to have multiple accounts but select a blanket default email so that we don’t have to remember to change the dropdown in Emails and Activities every single time.
